assignments.direction: Implement a genetic algorithm for job scheduling with custom crossover and mutation operators tailored for minimizing total tardiness.
Research and implement a reinforcement learning approach using Q-learning to dynamically select job processing orders based on job priority and deadline information.
Experiment with a simulated annealing algorithm for job scheduling, focusing on cooling schedules and neighborhood transitions to escape local optima.
Investigate a hybrid approach combining particle swarm optimization with local search heuristics for job scheduling problems.
